assumptions: Phi estimator, units, and coarse graining are declared before thresholding
alpha_Phi is calibrated or explicitly scanned rather than inferred post hoc
threshold labels are classifier outputs, not empirical collapse evidence
OR interpretation remains a falsifiable boundary hypothesis
executable_validation_targets: fit or scan positive E_Phi versus Phi proportionality
evaluate threshold crossing against a pre-registered Phi_crit
record estimator and coarse-graining sensitivity before interpretation
null_controls: label-shuffle control must destroy threshold predictive value
alpha-zero control must produce zero informational self-energy
subcritical Phi control must not promote a collapse label
specs.section_path: Structural Overview (by Domain) > Computational Unifier. > 1. The Threshold of Consciousness (IIT-OR)
validation_targets: linear E_Phi versus Phi proportionality check with positive alpha_Phi
threshold crossing classifier with pre-registered Phi_crit

variables.E_Phi: informational self-energy proxy assigned to a candidate state split
variables.Phi_crit: critical integrated-information threshold used for event labelling
variables.alpha_Phi: declared proportionality constant carrying the required units

assumptions: field boundary conditions are declared before computing divergence
derivative discretisation and metric signature are explicit
current conservation is tested on equations of motion, not arbitrary fields
gauge or global U(1) status is labelled before interpretation
executable_validation_targets: verify global U(1) phase invariance of the finite action density
measure discrete divergence residual for the Noether current
separate bulk conservation from explicit boundary flux
null_controls: phase-broken trajectory must violate current conservation
random complex field must not be labelled as conserved
open-boundary flux must be accounted before conservation claims
specs.section_path: Structural Overview (by Domain) > Computational Unifier. > X. Symmetry, Conservation Laws, and the Coherence Current
validation_targets: global phase invariance of the finite action density
discrete divergence residual for conserved-current trajectories

variables.Psi: complex scalar field or finite lattice field
variables.partial_mu: declared derivative operator on the chosen spacetime grid

assumptions: rho is strictly positive or regularised before division
grid spacing and boundary conditions are declared
Q is interpreted as a quantum-potential diagnostic, not direct energy output
singular-density points are rejected or handled by a stated regulariser
executable_validation_targets: recover zero quantum potential for constant positive density
match Gaussian quantum-potential analytic residual under refinement
reject singular or non-positive density before division by sqrt(rho)
null_controls: grid-coarsening control must expose Laplacian discretisation error
specs.section_path: Structural Overview (by Domain) > Computational Unifier. > XIV. The Physics of Information-Energy Transduction (IET)
validation_targets: grid-refinement convergence of the Laplacian term

variables.hbar: reduced Planck constant in the chosen unit system

summary.policy: EQ0119-EQ0122 anchors are promoted only into validation specifications. IIT-OR threshold, Noether-current, and IET quantum-potential interpretations remain simulator-only mathematical-boundary checks until executable falsification controls pass.
